nodes.label: Theme 5 — Multi-Latent Attention primitives.  Forward correctness of the latent
Numerically `latent_kv_compress` is just a matmul — the distinct         op_name
1-D input is reshaped to (1, latent_dim) — common decode pattern         where e
Exercise the full MLA pattern: compress hidden → cache latent →     expand at at
Standard MLA chain: split RoPE off, compress no-RoPE part to         latent, exp
Decode-style usage: per-step, compress one token's no-RoPE         slice, append
